project_type: Next.js 16 App Router full-stack application with AI agent (LangChain/LangGraph)
build_system: npm with Next.js build, Prisma for database
test_framework: None currently installed - will add vitest
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to get dependencies. 2. Run npx prisma generate. 3. Run npx next build to verify no TypeScript errors. 4. Run npx vitest run for unit tests.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/Si-Admin && npm install && npx prisma generate
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. SQLite database via better-sqlite3.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, path aliases via @/*, Next.js App Router conventions, Indonesian language in user-facing strings
key_patterns: API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse, Prisma client from @/lib/prisma, error responses have {error: string} shape with Indonesian messages, agent-guard modules export pure functions with typed results
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes; src/lib/ - shared utilities (prisma, langchain, agent-guard); prisma/ - schema and seed; scripts/guard/ - polyglot security scripts
